SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-31-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DILEK GAS. DEFENDANT GREGORY NOTO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAS, DILEK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOTO, GREGORY $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,165.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $2100 FOR DEPOSIT AND FIRST MONTH'S RENT ON APARTMENT THAT WAS NOT DELIVERED TO TENANT'S POSSESSION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
